  • Purpose: Act as templates. Scripts inside StarterPlayerScripts copy to the player on join; ScreenGuis inside StarterGui copy to player.PlayerGui.

1.9 Lighting

  • Purpose: Controls global lighting settings, shadows, atmosphere effects, and skies.
  • Key APIs: ClockTime, Ambient, Brightness, atmospheric post-processing objects.

2. Gameplay & Mechanics Services

2.1 UserInputService

  • Purpose: Detects input events (keyboard, mouse, gamepad, touch) on the client device.
  • Key APIs: InputBegan, InputEnded, TextBoxFocused, GetMouseLocation().
  • Example:
    •     -- Client-side script:
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
        if gameProcessed then return end -- Avoid triggering actions when typing in chat
        if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E then
            print("E key pressed!")
        end
    end)

2.2 ContextActionService

  • Purpose: Binds inputs to actions, automatically handling cross-platform configurations (creating touch buttons for mobile, gamepad binds for console).
  • Key APIs: BindAction(), UnbindAction(), SetTitle().
  • Example:
    •     local ContextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
    local function handleInteract(actionName, inputState, inputObj)
        if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
            print("Interacted!")
        end
    end
    ContextActionService:BindAction("Interact", handleInteract, true, Enum.KeyCode.E, Enum.KeyCode.ButtonX)

2.3 TweenService

  • Purpose: Smoothly interpolates numeric or vector properties (Position, Color, Size) of objects over time.
  • Key APIs: Create(), TweenInfo.new(), Completed.
  • Example:
    •     local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
    local info = TweenInfo.new(1.0, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
    local tween = TweenService:Create(part, info, { Size = Vector3.new(10, 10, 10) })
    tween:Play()

2.4 PathfindingService

  • Purpose: Calculates coordinate paths bypassing walls and obstacles for AI navigation.
  • Key APIs: CreatePath(), ComputeAsync(), GetWaypoints().
  • Example:
    •     local PathfindingService = game:GetService("PathfindingService")
    local path = PathfindingService:CreatePath()
    path:ComputeAsync(npc.Position, targetPosition)
    if path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
        local waypoints = path:GetWaypoints()
        -- npc moves to each waypoint...
    end

2.5 SoundService

  • Purpose: Manages global audio, ambient volume, audio categorization, and physical reverb effects.

2.6 RunService

  • Purpose: Exposes frame-level callbacks synchronization across physics updates and rendering loops.
  • Key APIs: Heartbeat (server/client tick), Stepped (pre-physics server tick), RenderStepped (pre-render client tick), IsStudio(), IsServer().
  • Example:
    •     local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(deltaTime)
        -- Runs every frame on both Server and Client after physics simulations
    end)

3. Cloud & Multi-Server Services

3.1 DataStoreService

  • Purpose: Accesses the global cloud database to save and load persistent player progress across play sessions.
  • Key APIs: GetDataStore(), GetAsync(), SetAsync(), UpdateAsync().
  • Example:
    •     local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
    local goldStore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerGold")
    
    local function saveGold(userId, amount)
        local success, err = pcall(function()
            goldStore:SetAsync("User_" .. userId, amount)
        end)
        return success, err
    end

3.2 MemoryStoreService

  • Purpose: Provides high-frequency, low-latency queues, sorted maps, and temporary storage with automatic TTL (Time-to-Live) expiry, shared across all servers.
  • Key APIs: GetQueue(), GetSortedMap(), AddQueueAsync().
  • Example:
    •     local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")
    local matchmakingQueue = MemoryStoreService:GetQueue("Matchmaking")
    matchmakingQueue:AddQueueAsync(player.UserId, 30) -- Add player to matchmaking queue for 30s

3.3 MessagingService

  • Purpose: Publishes message channels to communicate data payloads across all active server instances of your game in real time.
  • Key APIs: PublishAsync(), SubscribeAsync().
  • Example:
    •     local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
    
    -- Send message to all servers:
    MessagingService:PublishAsync("GlobalChat", { Sender = "System", Message = "Event Started!" })
    
    -- Listen to message on this server:
    MessagingService:SubscribeAsync("GlobalChat", function(message)
        print("Broadcasting chat:", message.Data.Message)
    end)

3.4 TeleportService

  • Purpose: Teleports players between different places (servers) within the same game experience, or external games.
  • Key APIs: TeleportAsync(), GetLocalPlayerTeleportData().
  • Example:
    •     local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
    local targetPlaceId = 12345678 -- Target Roblox Place ID
    TeleportService:TeleportAsync(targetPlaceId, { player })

3.5 MarketplaceService

  • Purpose: Handles transactions for Developer Products, Gamepasses, and Catalog items, triggering monetization hooks.
  • Key APIs: PromptGamePassPurchase(), ProcessReceipt (callback transaction gate).

3.6 BadgeService

  • Purpose: Awards permanent experience Badges to player profiles.
  • Key APIs: AwardBadge(), UserHasBadgeAsync().

4. Social & Communication Services

4.1 TextChatService

  • Purpose: Manages the modern Roblox chat engine, allowing message modifications, commands, and channel configurations.
  • Key APIs: OnIncomingMessage (rich-text hooks), chat channels.

4.2 GroupService

  • Purpose: Checks player ranking, roles, and status inside official Roblox Groups.
  • Key APIs: GetGroupsAsync(), GetGroupInfoAsync().

4.3 SocialService

  • Purpose: Prompts users to invite their platform friends to join the active server session.
  • Key APIs: PromptGameInvite(), CanSendGameInviteAsync().

5. System & Utility Services

5.1 HttpService

  • Purpose: Sends REST requests (GET, POST) to external web servers, and parses JSON payloads.
  • Key APIs: GetAsync(), PostAsync(), JSONEncode(), JSONDecode(), GenerateGUID().
  • Example:
    •     local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:GetAsync("https://api.example.com/status")
    end)
    if success then
        local data = HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
        print("API Status:", data.status)
    end

5.2 LogService

  • Purpose: Listens to messages output in the developer console (warnings, errors, prints).
  • Key APIs: MessageOut event.

5.3 ContentProvider

  • Purpose: Manages asset loading pipelines, allowing pre-loading of game textures, meshes, and audio before they are displayed.
  • Key APIs: PreloadAsync().

5.4 Debris

  • Purpose: Schedules instance destruction with a delay without blocking the script thread (a clean replacement for delayed wait functions).
  • Key APIs: AddItem().
  • Example:
    •     local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
    local projectile = Instance.new("Part")
    projectile.Parent = workspace
    Debris:AddItem(projectile, 5) -- Automatically destroys projectile after 5s

5.5 CollectionService

  • Purpose: Implements the tag system (adding metadata tags to instances) enabling cleaner component-based scripting across models.
  • Key APIs: AddTag(), RemoveTag(), GetTagged(), GetInstanceAddedSignal().
  • Example:
    •     local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
    
    -- Process all objects tagged as "Lava":
    for _, lava in ipairs(CollectionService:GetTagged("Lava")) do
        lava.Touched:Connect(function(part)
            local character = part.Parent
            if character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                character.Humanoid.Health = 0
            end
        end)
    end
